feed.title: A Bitcoin-native LLM: dataset, architecture and open questions

entry.title: A Bitcoin-native LLM: dataset, architecture and open questions
entry.summary:
The recent communication highlights an intention to focus primarily on developing Freedom Skills over the coming months. This focus suggests a strategic commitment to enhancing specific competencies or capabilities, which might be pertinent to personal development, professional skills, or possibly a project-related endeavor. The decision to revisit this area of focus at a later time indicates a structured approach to the topic, allowing for a period of implementation or deeper engagement before reassessment.
This phased approach demonstrates a methodical strategy in handling projects or skill areas by dedicating attention and resources in a concentrated manner initially and then scheduling a subsequent evaluation phase. This could potentially optimize outcomes and ensure that adjustments can be made based on the insights gained during the initial execution phase.
